subQueries: 架构数据流完整性与模块划分评审
边界情况与优雅降级设计评审

sources.title: Incremental Knowledge Search Design Doc
sources.snippet: 将 Searchkiller 的搜索后端从"每次全量外部搜索"升级为"ES 知识库优先 + 增量外部补充"模式

sources.title: Evaluator D1: API Reliability Probe
sources.snippet: Tests HTTP 2xx, valid JSON, required fields, SLA compliance

sources.title: Evaluator D2: Search Quality Probe
sources.snippet: Tests Exa+ES sources, dedup, snippet non-empty rate

sources.title: Evaluator D3: Data Integrity Probe
sources.snippet: Validates subQueries, sessionId UUID, source field completeness

sources.title: Evaluator D4: Cache Effectiveness Probe
sources.snippet: Session creation, cache hit, cache miss → 404

sources.title: Evaluator D5: Graceful Degradation Probe
sources.snippet: Invalid input handling, error codes, malformed JSON

sources.title: Backend Judge — source_diversity logic
sources.snippet: Uses url.includes('#internal') to distinguish ES vs Exa sources

sources.title: Harness Adapter — fetchSources
sources.snippet: Bridges Exa+ES into HandoffSource with URL dedup

evaluation.feedback:
**总评**: 架构设计合理但 Evaluator 集成缝隙明显，需补充超时/限流/source origin 追踪

**评分**: architecture_soundness=8.5 | probe_alignment=6.4 | edge_case_coverage=5.8 | evaluator_compatibility=6.5 | implementation_readiness=7.0

**优点**:
  + 模块划分严格遵循 L0-L3 权限层级
  + KnowledgeEntry 使用 Zod schema 校验 Gemini 输出
  + 向后兼容设计（project_id 可选，默认 default）

**不足**:
  - checkCoverage() 缺少独立超时机制（P0）
  - Gemini 并发提取无限流控制（P0）
  - 语义去重(cosine 0.85)与URL去重标准不匹配
  - BackendJudge source_diversity 逻辑需要 source origin 标记
  - knowledge-cache 缺少独立健康检查 probe

**改进建议**:
  1. 为 kNN 查询添加 3s 独立 timeout，超时 fallback 为 uncovered
  2. 使用 p-limit(concurrency:5) 控制 Gemini 提取并发
  3. 在 Source 接口添加 origin: 'exa'|'es'|'knowledge-cache' 字段
  4. 定义 KnowledgeEntry → Source 的映射逻辑
  5. 使用 ES op_type:create + deterministic _id 解决 TOCTOU 竞态

history.summary: Design doc v0.2.0: Fixed all 10 findings (2P0 + 4P1 + 4P2). Key changes: checkCoverage 3s timeout, p-limit(5) Gemini concurrency, two-layer dedup, toSource() mapping, deterministic _id idempotency, Source.origin field, deleteKnowledge API, Security/Observability sections, knowledge-cache probe coverage.
